title: Cartan Decomposition
description: Cartan decomposition is a structural decomposition of Lie algebras, dividing Hamiltonian terms into symmetric subalgebra k and antisymmetric space m based on commutation relations.

params.help: Hamiltonian to be simulated, represented as a Hermitan matrix. Must be provided as a 2D array.
params.name: H

params.help: Total evolution time for the Hamiltonian simulation.
params.name: t

params.help: Error tolerance for the decomposition. Smaller values yield more accurate results but may require more computational resources.
params.name: error
params.info: 请输入科学计数法正数（如 1e-6）或浮点数（如 0.001）
